emails.subject: RE: Hello From Canada
emails.body: RE: Hello From Canada I would be happy to speak with this person. Although our experience with Mexico is limited, I can provide a briefing and offer others to speak with at Enron. To: Harris, Steven; Watson, Kimberly; McCarty, Danny

emails.body: I can't find her phone number, but just email her and shell call you back. Thanks Df To: Fossum, Drew; Watson, Kimberly; McCarty, Danny
